agents.agent_role: Interpret market narrative, risk appetite, panic or euphoria tone, and narrative rotation.
agents.summary: This desk interprets market narrative posture, crowding warnings, and sentiment contradictions to identify clean vs. dirty headlines influencing tape.

[NEWS] AAPL: Neutral sentiment with 3 headlines but no clean narrative rotation (Apple price hikes vs. AI fatigue contradiction)
[THESIS] Clean narrative rotation requires headline purity: GOOGL's AI search headline is clean but diluted by unrelated tech headlines

P2: AAPL's AI fatigue contradiction with price hike headlines creates sentiment instability
P3: Live news shows political events (Gavin Newsom) but no direct market impact on tech narratives
